findings.description: The knowledge file states a rule: '基本的な1シートテストでは`nablarch.test.core.batch.BatchRequestTestSupport`を使用し、複数シート分割テストでは`nablarch.test.core.messaging.BatchRequestTestSupport`を使用する'. The source never states this distinction. It merely shows two separate code examples (in different example classes, B21AC01Test and B21AA01Test) that happen to use different imports. The source provides no explanation for why the imports differ, and does not prescribe which import to use for which pattern. Converting an unexplained coincidence in example code into an explicit usage rule is a fabrication.
findings.source_evidence: Source uses `nablarch.test.core.batch.BatchRequestTestSupport` in the introductory class skeleton and `nablarch.test.core.messaging.BatchRequestTestSupport` in the multi-sheet split example, but neither the headings nor surrounding prose attribute the difference to the single-sheet vs multi-sheet distinction.
